sentences.target: Ich fahre morgen zur Messe in Köln.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ˈfaːʁə ˈmɔʁɡən tsuːɐ̯ ˈmɛsə ɪn kœln/

translations.de: Ich fahre morgen zur Messe in Köln.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ˈfaːʁə ˈmɔʁɡən tsuːɐ̯ ˈmɛsə ɪn kœln/
translations.en: I'm going to the trade fair in Cologne tomorrow.
translations.es: Mañana voy a la feria en Colonia.
translations.fr: Je vais au salon de Cologne demain.
translations.it: Domani vado alla fiera a Colonia.
translations.ru: Завтра я еду на выставку в Кёльн.
translations.pt: Amanhã vou à feira em Colônia.
translations.vi: Ngày mai tôi đi hội chợ ở Cologne.
translations.ar: سأذهب غدًا إلى المعرض في كولونيا.
translations.nl: Morgen ga ik naar de beurs in Keulen.
translations.uk: Завтра їду на виставку в Кельн.
translations.hi: मैं कल कोलोन में मेले में जा रहा हूँ.
translations.pl: Jutro jadę na targi do Kolonii.
translations.el: Αύριο πάω στην έκθεση στην Κολωνία.
translations.nb: Jeg drar på messe i Köln i morgen.
translations.id: Besok saya pergi ke pameran dagang di Cologne.
translations.sv: Jag åker till mässan i Köln i morgon.
translations.ro: Merg mâine la târgul din Köln.
translations.cs: Zítra jedu na veletrh do Kolína nad Rýnem.
translations.da: Jeg tager til messen i Köln i morgen.
translations.ja: 明日ケルンの見本市に行きます。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular, nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb, 1st person singular, present (Präsens); expresses motion/going by vehicle.
Temporal adverb indicating time.
Contraction of preposition 'zu' + article 'der' (feminine dative); introduces a dative complement.
Common noun, feminine; dative singular as object of 'zur'.
Preposition marking location; takes dative here (static location).
Proper noun (city); complement of 'in' indicating location.

sentences.target: Wir haben auf der Messe viele Leute getroffen.
sentences.reading: /viːɐ̯ ˈhaːbən aʊ̯f deːɐ̯ ˈmɛsə ˈfiːlə ˈlɔʏtə ɡəˈtʁɔfən/

translations.de: Wir haben auf der Messe viele Leute getroffen.
translations.ipa: /viːɐ̯ ˈhaːbən aʊ̯f deːɐ̯ ˈmɛsə ˈfiːlə ˈlɔʏtə ɡəˈtʁɔfən/
translations.en: We met many people at the trade fair.
translations.es: Conocimos a mucha gente en la feria.
translations.fr: On a rencontré beaucoup de gens au salon.
translations.it: Abbiamo incontrato molte persone alla fiera.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们在展会上遇到了很多人。
translations.yue: 我哋喺展會識咗好多人。
translations.ru: Мы на выставке встретили много людей.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đã gặp rất nhiều người ở hội chợ.
translations.ar: التقينا بالكثير من الناس في المعرض.
translations.nl: We hebben op de beurs veel mensen ontmoet.
translations.uk: Ми на виставці зустріли багато людей.
translations.hi: हमने मेले में बहुत से लोगों से मुलाकात की.
translations.nb: Vi møtte mange folk på messa.
translations.id: Kami bertemu banyak orang di pameran dagang.
translations.sv: Vi träffade många människor på mässan.
translations.ro: Am întâlnit mulți oameni la târg.
translations.cs: Na veletrhu jsme potkali spoustu lidí.
translations.da: Vi mødte mange mennesker på messen.
translations.ja: 見本市でたくさんの人に会いました。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person plural, nominative; subject.
Auxiliary verb, 1st person plural, present; forms the Perfekt with the participle 'getroffen'.
Preposition meaning 'on/at'; governs dative here (static location).
Definite article, feminine dative singular; agrees with 'Messe'.
Common noun, feminine; dative singular as complement of 'auf'.
Quantifier determiner modifying 'Leute'; accusative plural.
Plural noun (pluralia tantum); accusative plural direct object of 'getroffen' (in Perfekt).
Past participle; main lexical verb forming Perfekt with 'haben'.

sentences.target: Sie sucht noch ein Hotel für die Messe.
sentences.reading: /ziː zuːxt nɔx aɪ̯n hoˈtɛl fyːɐ̯ diː ˈmɛsə/

translations.de: Sie sucht noch ein Hotel für die Messe.
translations.ipa: /ziː zuːxt nɔx aɪ̯n hoˈtɛl fyːɐ̯ diː ˈmɛsə/
translations.en: She is still looking for a hotel for the trade fair.
translations.es: Ella todavía está buscando un hotel para la feria.
translations.fr: Elle cherche encore un hôtel pour le salon.
translations.it: Lei sta ancora cercando un albergo per la fiera.
translations.ko: 그녀는 박람회를 위해 아직 호텔을 찾고 있어요.
translations.yue: 佢仲喺度搵展會嗰邊嘅酒店。
translations.ru: Она всё ещё ищет гостиницу для выставки.
translations.pt: Ela ainda está procurando um hotel para a feira.
translations.tr: O hâlâ fuar için bir otel arıyor.
translations.vi: Cô ấy vẫn đang tìm khách sạn cho hội chợ.
translations.ar: هي ما زالت تبحث عن فندق للمعرض.
translations.nl: Ze zoekt nog een hotel voor de beurs.
translations.uk: Вона все ще шукає готель для виставки.
translations.hu: Még mindig szállodát keres a vásárra.
translations.hi: वह अभी भी मेले के लिए होटल ढूँढ रही है.
translations.pl: Ona wciąż szuka hotelu na targi.
translations.el: Ακόμα ψάχνει ξενοδοχείο για την έκθεση.
translations.nb: Hun leter fortsatt etter et hotell til messa.
translations.id: Dia masih mencari hotel untuk pameran dagang.
translations.sv: Hon letar fortfarande efter ett hotell till mässan.
translations.ro: Ea încă caută un hotel pentru târg.
translations.cs: Ona stále hledá hotel na veletrh.
translations.da: Hun leder stadig efter et hotel til messen.
translations.fi: Hän etsii yhä hotellia messuja varten.
translations.ja: 彼女は見本市用のホテルをまだ探しています。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 3rd person singular, nominative; subject.
Finite main verb, 3rd person singular, present.
Adverb meaning 'still/yet'.
Indefinite article; neuter accusative singular, modifies 'Hotel'.
Common noun, neuter; accusative singular direct object of 'sucht'.
Preposition governing the accusative; introduces purpose/beneficiary phrase.
Definite article, feminine accusative singular; agrees with 'Messe'.
Common noun, feminine; accusative singular object of 'für'.

sentences.target: Mein Chef gibt mir Karten für die Messe.
sentences.reading: /maɪ̯n ʃɛf ɡɪpt miːɐ̯ ˈkaʁtən fyːɐ̯ diː ˈmɛsə/

translations.de: Mein Chef gibt mir Karten für die Messe.
translations.ipa: /maɪ̯n ʃɛf ɡɪpt miːɐ̯ ˈkaʁtən fyːɐ̯ diː ˈmɛsə/
translations.en: My boss is giving me tickets for the trade fair.
translations.es: Mi jefe me da entradas para la feria.
translations.fr: Mon patron me donne des billets pour le salon.
translations.it: Il mio capo mi dà i biglietti per la fiera.
translations.zh-Hans: 我老板给我展会的门票。
translations.yue: 我老闆畀我展會嘅門票。
translations.ru: Мой начальник дает мне билеты на выставку.
translations.pt: Meu chefe me dá ingressos para a feira.
translations.he: הבוס שלי נותן לי כרטיסים ליריד.
translations.tr: Patronum bana fuar için biletler veriyor.
translations.vi: Sếp tôi đang cho tôi vé đi hội chợ.
translations.nl: Mijn baas geeft me kaartjes voor de beurs.
translations.uk: Мій начальник дає мені квитки на виставку.
translations.hu: A főnököm jegyeket ad nekem a vásárra.
translations.hi: मेरे बॉस मुझे मेले के लिए टिकट दे रहे हैं.
translations.pl: Mój szef daje mi bilety na targi.
translations.el: Το αφεντικό μου μου δίνει εισιτήρια για την έκθεση.
translations.nb: Sjefen min gir meg billetter til messa.
translations.id: Bos saya memberi saya tiket untuk pameran dagang.
translations.sv: Min chef ger mig biljetter till mässan.
translations.ro: Șeful meu îmi dă bilete pentru târg.
translations.cs: Šéf mi dává lístky na veletrh.
translations.da: Min chef giver mig billetter til messen.
translations.ja: 上司が見本市のチケットをくれます。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner; nominative singular masculine, modifies 'Chef'.
Common noun, masculine; nominative singular subject.
Finite main verb, 3rd person singular, present.
Personal pronoun, 1st person singular, dative; indirect object/recipient.
Common noun, plural; accusative plural direct object (thing given).
Preposition governing the accusative; introduces beneficiary/purpose phrase.
Definite article, feminine accusative singular; agrees with 'Messe'.
Common noun, feminine; accusative singular object of 'für'.
